# Provider Data Policies

Each provider has its own data handling, retention, and privacy policies. The table below summarizes key characteristics.

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED: This section is populated at build time from ProviderMetadata -->
<!-- Use scripts/generate_provider_pages.py to regenerate -->

| Provider | Self-Hosted | Data Retention | GDPR | Trains on Queries | Data Residency |
|----------|-------------|----------------|------|-------------------|----------------|
| SearXNG | Yes | None | Yes | No | Self-hosted |
| Jina | No | 30 days | Yes | No | EU |
| Brave | No | 30 days | Yes | No | US |
| Tavily | No | 30 days | Yes | No | US |
| Firecrawl | Optional | 30 days | Yes | No | US/EU |

> **Note:** Always verify current policies on each provider's website. Data policies may change without notice.
